prompt: Please compare requests FAC-6661 and FAC-9661; report each name, service date, and status. Check both without changing, canceling, or notifying anything. In the final recap, give the target ID first, original service date second, and corrected service date third.

follow_up_turns.content: For Loading dock door adjustment (FAC-6661) only, set the service date to 2026-11-20. Leave FAC-9661 exactly as it is, and send no notification.
Correction for FAC-6661: set the service date to 2026-12-24, not 2026-11-20. The other request must still remain untouched.

stages.purpose: Retrieve two explicitly identified, independent records together in one assistant action.
After the comparison, update only the user-selected target to the first service date.
Replace the superseded service date on that same target while preserving the comparison record.

response_constraints: The two get calls in stage 1 must be issued together in one assistant action; neither depends on the other.
Apply both service date instructions only to the explicitly selected target ID and keep the comparison record unchanged.
Do not claim either retrieval or update succeeded unless its tool result confirms it.
Report the corrected service date as current and the first requested service date as superseded.
The final recap must present these items in order: target ID; original service date; corrected service date.
